steps.title: Identify input and output
steps.content: In $F(m)=6m$, the input $m$ is mass in kilograms, and the output $F(m)$ is force in newtons.

steps.title: Interpret the function value
steps.content: The statement $F(5)=30$ means that an object with mass $5$ kilograms has estimated force $30$ newtons. The answer is A.
